intro: Neopaulia ovczinnikovii is a species of flowering plant in the genus Neopaulia, native to the Andes in South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Neopaulia ovczinnikovii include alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
